pi_items.source: Task description explicitly dictates 'Create a forensic case named Photo_Provenance_2024' and export_result.sh searches for glob path /home/ga/Cases/Photo_Provenance_2024*/autopsy.db.
Task description explicitly specifies 'with case number INV-EXIF-006'.
Task description instructs to 'Add /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd' and setup_task.sh checks for the image's existence at this path.
Task description requires writing the catalog to this path, and export_result.sh specifically reads this file.
Task description requires writing the summary to this path, and export_result.sh specifically reads this file.
export_result.sh explicitly writes to this path and verifier.py reads from it.
setup_task.sh explicitly computes and writes the ground truth to this path, and verifier.py reads from it.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real digital forensics test image (DFTT #8 JPEG Search) dynamically downloaded from SourceForge, containing an NTFS filesystem with embedded JPEGs. The ground truth (total images, EXIF data, GPS info) is dynamically computed at runtime via the fls and icat Sleuth Kit utilities in setup_task.sh. All metadata claims accurately reflect the explicitly dictated task instructions and hardcoded script paths.
